title: TuningConfig
description: Session-wide bootstrap config produced by `pilot session init`. Lives at `state/<session_id>/tuning.yaml` and is the canonical source for: (a) the log-directory layout convention every stage of this session must follow — `log_dir_prefix/<trace_subdir>/<stage>`; (b) the consolidated inputs (plan, cluster_config, target, budget, base_overrides); (c) per-stage defaults (iters, timeouts, trace dirs). Other artifacts in the same session directory (target_vector.yaml, tuning_state.yaml, r0 checkpoint) are mirrored from this file. See `skills/workflow/orchestration.md` §0.3 (bootstrap protocol).

session_id.description: Stable identifier; matches the directory name `state/<session_id>/`.

plan.description: Path to the base Primus exp YAML (e.g. `examples/megatron/configs/MI355X/deepseek_v2_lite-FP8-pretrain.yaml`). Relative paths are repo-rooted.

cluster_config.description: Path to the cluster.yaml that every Pilot tool will consume.

log_dir_prefix.description: Root directory under which every stage of this session writes its trace artifacts. Conventionally `state/<session_id>`; relative paths are anchored at the pilot package root.

trace_subdir.description: Sub-directory under `log_dir_prefix` that contains per-stage trace folders. Full per-stage path = `{log_dir_prefix}/{trace_subdir}/{stage}`. Defaults to `trace`.

base_overrides.description: Plan-level overrides applied to every stage's launch (e.g. `micro_batch_size: 1`, `global_batch_size: 8`).

stages.description: Per-stage defaults. Each block specifies the trace directory (relative to `log_dir_prefix`, must lie under `trace_subdir/`) and optional iter/timeout overrides for that stage. The `optimize_loop` block uses `dir_pattern` with `{trial_id}` substitution to namespace each tuning trial under `trace/t1`, `trace/t2`, ...

dir_pattern.description: Path pattern (relative to log_dir_prefix) for per-trial trace dirs. Must contain `{trial_id}` — substituted with `t1`, `t2`, ... at trial launch.

related.description: Pointers to other artifacts living next to tuning.yaml in the same session directory.

node.description: Optional informational hint (e.g. `mi355-gpu-26`). Not consumed by tools; for human readability.

dir.description: Trace directory for this stage, relative to log_dir_prefix. Convention: `<trace_subdir>/<stage_name>`.
